prestazioni: Lamborghini L539 5.2L V10 naturally aspirated engine (direct injection, 640 HP stock) – full Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion with custom lambda-based fueling maps for E85 flex-fuel compatibility, paired with a Novitec Tridente titanium exhaust system (3.5-inch diameter, Inconel 625 headers, and carbon fiber mufflers) to reduce backpressure by 22% while retaining OEM-style sound levels under 95 dB

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger kit (custom billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and a PTP carbon fiber intake manifold (plenum volume increased to 4.2L) for forced induction, targeting 850 HP at 2.2 bar boost on 93 octane with a custom intercooler setup (PWR 4.5-core front-mount, 1200 CFM airflow capacity)

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound), Lamborghini-specific spring rates (12 kg/mm front, 16 kg/mm rear), and a custom anti-roll bar setup (H&R adjustable 25mm front, 22mm rear) to eliminate body roll while maintaining OEM-level ride compliance for track use
estetica: Novitec Huracán EVO-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, front splitter with integrated canards, and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap) to accommodate 20x10.5 ET25 front and 21x13 ET35 rear wheels (Forgeline FT-5, 3-piece forged, 5x112 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear)

Rocket Bunny V3 aero package (carbon fiber GT-style rear wing with dual-plane design, 1.2m span, and adjustable angle of attack from 5° to 20°) paired with a custom front bumper lip (3D-printed carbon fiber, 30% larger than OEM) to generate 350 kg of downforce at 200 km/h

Full Alcantara interior retrim (Rosen Racing, fireproof Alcantara with red stitching) including custom door cards with integrated carbon fiber speaker pods (Focal Utopia M 3-way components), a roll cage (Custom Cages T45 steel, bolt-in, with integrated fire suppression system), and a digital dash upgrade (Aim MXS Strada 1.2 with OBD-II integration for real-time boost, AFR, and oil pressure monitoring)
